card_description: Olive Holt is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick discusses the "economy of design" in a human life, suggesting that God places subtle, retrograde clues at early stages that only reveal their meaning at the end of the "solution."
